flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at King University fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 908).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at King University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (975 vs 1.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at King University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (70.9% → 60.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at King University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.8k → $36.2k).
